children.text: the date on which the national emergency concerning the novel coronavirus disease (COVID–19) outbreak declared by the President on under the National Emergencies Act ( et seq.) terminates; orMarch 13, 202050 U.S.C. 1601

children.heading: Records
children.label: b Records
children.text: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System shall keep a record of all Board votes and the reasons for such votes during the period described in subsection (a).
